description_long: This is a compact, single-story house with a modern, minimalist design, featuring horizontal white siding and a flat roof. The front facade includes a wooden door with an oval window, flanked by a small rectangular window and a set of steps leading up to a dark gray porch deck. The sides of the house display a mix of white siding and a stone or brick base, with several small, rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a continuation of the stone base, as well as a large deck area extending from one side. The roof is flat and open, exposing the interior layout, which includes visible rooms and furnishings. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story house with white siding, a flat roof, and a wooden front door, featuring a dark gray porch and stone base. The design is compact and minimalist, with asymmetrical windows and an open roof showing the interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden door with oval window, steps, porch, and a small window to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone base, white siding, and a large deck extending from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings, white siding, and a clear view of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing multiple small windows, the stone base, and the continuation of the deck.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with oval window, steps leading to a dark gray porch, no overhang or columns, minimalist design
